case_title: FULLERTON, JENNIFER VS SHTURMAN, ALEX (OWNER) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FULLERTON, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT SHTURMAN, ALEX (OWNER) YEFREMOV, STANISLAU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHTURMAN, ALEX (OWNER)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FULLERTON, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHTURMAN, ALEX (OWNER) YEFREMOV, STANISLAU $3,141.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,161.00, $2131 MEDICAL BILLS; $100 TRAVEL EXPENSES; $910 LOST WAGES. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SHTURMAN, ALEX (OWNER) YEFREMOV, STANISLAU
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFT RETURNED NO SHOULD NUMBER.
